scripts.dev:u: concurrently --names "backend,ai,user" --prefix-colors "blue,green,cyan" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:ai" "pnpm run dev:user"
scripts.dev:v: concurrently --names "backend,ai,vendor" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:ai" "pnpm run dev:vendor"
scripts.dev:a: concurrently --names "backend,ai,admin" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:ai" "pnpm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "backend,ai,user,vendor,admin" --prefix-colors "blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:ai" "pnpm run dev:user" "pnpm run dev:vendor" "pnpm run dev:admin"
scripts.db:reset: pnpm run db:down && pnpm run db:up && node -e "new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,5000)).then(()=>process.exit(0))" && pnpm run db:migrate
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run db:up && pnpm run db:migrate
